title: Cobblemon SMP: Trainer's Journey
description: This modpack is designed to boost the experience on the MMCN Cobblemon Minecraft server.
body:
MMCN Cobblemon SMP Modpack (Minecraft 1.21.1 – Latest Cobblemon)

MMCN Cobblemon SMP: Trainer's Journey is the official modpack for the MMCN Cobblemon SMP server, built on Minecraft 1.21.1 and powered by the latest Cobblemon mod.

Whether you’re new to Cobblemon or looking for an immersive multiplayer experience, this pack delivers a survival-friendly, server-optimized adventure with seamless integration into the MMCN Cobblemon SMP.

🟢 Install the modpack, join the server, and explore the Cobblemon World today.

🚀 Modpack Highlights:
✅ Includes the latest version of the Cobblemon mod (1.21.1 compatible)
🌍 New Biomes & Dimensions: Explore new worlds and encounter new Pokémon
🧭 Exploration Tools: JourneyMap, Waystones, and new biomes for the ultimate adventure
🛡️ Optimized for multiplayer performance and survival gameplay
⚡ Enhanced experience with custom server features, gyms, UltraSpace, and more
🧩 Seamless integration into MMCN Cobblemon SMP - just install and join!
⚡ One-click install via Modrinth - no manual configuration required


🧩 Featured Mods:

Cobblemon – Catch, evolve, and battle in the Minecraft world

JourneyMap – Real-time minimap and waypoint tracking

Waystones – Teleport between towns and biomes

Terralith Diverse, immersive world generation

UltraSpace – Discover portals to otherworldly dimensions

🌐 Join the MMCN Cobblemon SMP
💬 Discord: https://discord.gg/mmcn

  How to Install MMCN Cobblemon SMP Modpack:
  Open the CurseForge Launcher
  Search for MMCN Cobblemon SMP
  Click Install

🌟 Start Your Cobblemon Journey!
Download MMCN Cobblemon SMP: Trainer's Journey and play on the official MMCN Cobblemon SMP — the most feature-rich, community-driven, and up-to-date Cobblemon server modpack available for Minecraft 1.21.1.
